title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS OF THE GREATER SANTIAM SWEET HOME BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities and team sports, providing nutrition education, and helping them develop healthy relationships. The school district buses students from school to the After-School Program. 890 18th Avenue Sweet Home, OR 97386 Eligibility: Ages 3-18 Hours: After-School Programs: Monday-Thursday 3:30pm-6:30pm, Friday 8am-6pm Early Release: Wednesday 12:45pm-6:30pm Activity times may vary Email (541) 367-6421 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 367-6421 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $200 monthly fee, $15 daily rate or a $100 for 10 day punch card (scholarships available) DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Lebanon and Sweet Home SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind Sweet Home High School Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
